profile.title: AI and Machine Learning Engineer
profile.subtitle: AI and Machine Learning Engineer | Python Developer | Cybersecurity Enthusiast

hero.label: Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning
hero.description: Final-year B.Tech student passionate about Artificial Intelligence, Machine Learning, Cybersecurity, and Software Development. Skilled in building intelligent applications, problem-solving, and creating impactful technology solutions.

about.heading: Bridging the gap between intelligence and implementation
paragraphs: I'm a final-year B.Tech student at United Institute of Technology, Prayagraj, specializing in Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning. My journey in tech is driven by a relentless curiosity about how intelligent systems can solve real-world problems.

With a strong foundation in Python, Data Structures, and Machine Learning, I've built projects ranging from phishing detection systems to AI-powered games. I'm particularly fascinated by the intersection of cybersecurity and AI - how machine learning can fortify digital defenses.
Currently preparing for GATE 2027, I'm committed to deepening my understanding of Computer Science fundamentals while staying at the cutting edge of AI research and application.

projects.title: Phishing Detection System
projects.description: Developed a phishing detection system using URL analysis and feature extraction. Improved suspicious link identification using rule-based techniques and machine learning.

projects.title: Crop Recommendation Web App
projects.description: Built a crop recommendation system using soil and environmental parameters with an interactive web interface for farmers.

projects.title: AI Tic Tac Toe
projects.description: Developed an intelligent AI opponent using the minimax algorithm with alpha-beta pruning, built with Python and Tkinter GUI.

projects.title: LAN Connect
projects.description: A LAN-based communication platform supporting local device connectivity and real-time messaging without internet.

certifications.title: Python for Data Science Summer Training

education.degree: B.Tech in Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning

contact.heading: Get in Touch
contact.text: I'm always open to discussing new projects, research opportunities, or collaborations in AI and machine learning.
